item.title: LangChain v0.3 Released With Native MCP Support
item.description: LangChain has released version 0.3 with native Model Context Protocol support, enabling seamless integration with OpenClaw and other agent frameworks.

item.title: CrewAI Raises $50M Series B for Multi-Agent Orchestration
item.description: CrewAI has closed a $50M Series B round led by Sequoia to expand its role-based multi-agent orchestration platform.

item.title: OpenAI Agents SDK Now Supports Tool Streaming
item.description: OpenAI updated its Agents SDK with tool streaming capabilities, reducing latency for complex multi-step agent workflows.
